args.command:
set -eu
cd /workspace
printf '__DEMO_READY__\n'
IFS= read -r action
[ "$action" = publish ]

purpose: Hold the primary workspace open behind the publication gate
Inspect the shared storefront entry point
Inspect this agent's unclaimed line in the shared feature registry
Inspect the shared commerce boundary
Inspect the browser shell that consumes the shared registry
Introduce a deliberately incomplete implementation on this agent's registry line

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("verify() { return true; }")) { console.error("A09 target settles after repair"); console.error("A09 implementation should report verified"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 target settles after repair");'

purpose: Prove the registry contract fails before repair
Inspect the failed line before applying the smallest repair
Repair this agent's implementation in the shared registry

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the repaired shared registry

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("verify() { return true; }")) { console.error("A09 target settles after repair"); console.error("A09 implementation should report verified"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 target settles after repair");'

purpose: Prove the original red contract turns green
Add deterministic fixture metadata to this agent's registry line

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the registry after the data edit
Inspect the deterministic fixture metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("fixture: '"'"'accessibility-fixture'"'"'")) { console.error("A09 fixture is deterministic"); console.error("A09 shared registry is missing data evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 fixture is deterministic");'

purpose: Verify the deterministic fixture contract
Add this domain's semantic view metadata to the shared registry

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the registry after the view edit
Inspect the semantic view metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("data-domain=\"accessibility\"")) { console.error("A09 view has a semantic section"); console.error("A09 shared registry is missing view evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 view has a semantic section");'

purpose: Verify the semantic view contract
Add visible-focus metadata to this agent's shared line
Inspect the entry point's unified presentation and focus layer

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("focusVisible: true")) { console.error("A09 style keeps focus visible"); console.error("A09 shared registry is missing style evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 style keeps focus visible");'

purpose: Verify this contribution preserves visible focus
Add keyboard and reduced-motion metadata to the shared registry

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the accessibility contribution
Inspect keyboard and reduced-motion metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("reducedMotion: true")) { console.error("A09 honors reduced motion"); console.error("A09 shared registry is missing a11y evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 honors reduced motion");'

purpose: Verify the reduced-motion contract
Add durable ownership metadata to this agent's registry line
Inspect the durable ownership metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("owner: '"'"'A09'"'"'")) { console.error("A09 manifest names its owner"); console.error("A09 shared registry is missing manifest evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 manifest names its owner");'

purpose: Verify the line names its durable owner
Review the compact shared storefront entry point
Review shared commerce configuration before publication
Review the browser shell that composes all contributions
Review the inline responsive style layer
Review this agent's full contribution in shared context
Reconfirm the conflict-sensitive configuration head

args.command: node --check src/registry.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/app.js

purpose: Syntax-check every shared JavaScript surface
Inspect ownership evidence before the integration checks
Add this agent's verification to the one shared test module

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const [index, app, registry, tests] = await Promise.all(['"'"'index.html'"'"', '"'"'src/app.js'"'"', '"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'tests/storefront.test.mjs'"'"'].map(function (path) { return readFile(path, '"'"'utf8'"'"'); })); const line = registry.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!index.includes('"'"'./src/registry.js'"'"') || !app.includes('"'"'FlashCart.features'"'"') || !line || !line.includes('"'"'schemaVersion: 1'"'"') || !tests.includes('"'"'A09 Accessibility and performance contribution is ready'"'"')) process.exit(1); console.log('"'"'A09 shared application contract verified'"'"');'

purpose: Verify the shared application and collaborative test contract
Inspect the line immediately before its ready transition

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Recheck the collaborative registry before finalization
Mark this agent's line ready for the coordinated publication

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A09:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("status: '"'"'ready'"'"'")) { console.error("A09 implementation is marked ready"); console.error("A09 shared registry is missing quality evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A09 implementation is marked ready");'

purpose: Prove this contribution is publication-ready
Release the gated workspace only after every primary feature gate is green

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { createServer } from '"'"'node:http'"'"'; const server = createServer(function (_, response) { response.end('"'"'ok'"'"'); }); server.once('"'"'error'"'"', function (error) { if (error.code === '"'"'EADDRINUSE'"'"') { console.log('"'"'PORT_COLLISION'"'"'); process.exit(0); } throw error; }); process.stdin.setEncoding('"'"'utf8'"'"'); process.stdin.on('"'"'data'"'"', function (value) { if (value.trim() === '"'"'stop'"'"') server.close(function () { process.exit(0); }); }); server.listen(4173, '"'"'0.0.0.0'"'"', function () { console.log('"'"'PORT_BOUND shared-one'"'"'); });'

purpose: Bind or observe the port-4173 shared-one trusted-session experiment

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { createServer } from '"'"'node:http'"'"'; const server = createServer(function (_, response) { response.end('"'"'ok'"'"'); }); server.once('"'"'error'"'"', function (error) { if (error.code === '"'"'EADDRINUSE'"'"') { console.log('"'"'PORT_COLLISION'"'"'); process.exit(0); } throw error; }); process.stdin.setEncoding('"'"'utf8'"'"'); process.stdin.on('"'"'data'"'"', function (value) { if (value.trim() === '"'"'stop'"'"') server.close(function () { process.exit(0); }); }); server.listen(4173, '"'"'0.0.0.0'"'"', function () { console.log('"'"'PORT_BOUND shared-two'"'"'); });'

purpose: Bind or observe the port-4173 shared-two trusted-session experiment

purpose: Bind or observe the port-4173 isolated-one trusted-session experiment

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { createServer } from '"'"'node:http'"'"'; const server = createServer(function (_, response) { response.end('"'"'ok'"'"'); }); server.once('"'"'error'"'"', function (error) { if (error.code === '"'"'EADDRINUSE'"'"') { console.log('"'"'PORT_COLLISION'"'"'); process.exit(0); } throw error; }); process.stdin.setEncoding('"'"'utf8'"'"'); process.stdin.on('"'"'data'"'"', function (value) { if (value.trim() === '"'"'stop'"'"') server.close(function () { process.exit(0); }); }); server.listen(4173, '"'"'0.0.0.0'"'"', function () { console.log('"'"'PORT_BOUND isolated-two'"'"'); });'
